gemini_response.evidence: The weapon in the gameplay frames matches the double-barreled design and red/orange highlights of the SUPER_SHOTGUN reference. Firing is visible through a prominent red/orange muzzle flash in frames 3 and 4, accompanied by blood splatter on the enemy and a decrease in the 'SHKT' (shells) ammo count from 34 to 32. The weapon also visibly cycles after firing.
